metadata.track_name: Fix TUI stability and migrate non-state logs to JSONL
metadata.goal: Stabilize eidolon-tui under sustained coding sessions and move non-state logs to append-only JSONL storage
metadata.description: Fix TUI freeze and hang risks by reducing hot-path logging/projection pressure and migrating non-state diagnostics to append-only JSONL storage.

phase.name: Reproduce and define the pressure boundary
phase.goal: Lock down the failing behavior with focused regression tests and log classification decisions.

task.name: Add regression tests for hot-path pressure
task.description: Cover repeated runtime event updates, sync event churn, and the current logging behavior that blocks the UI thread.

task.name: Define non-state log classification and JSONL contract
task.description: Finalize the initial boundary for non-state diagnostics and record the JSONL append-only file shape in decisions.md.

phase.name: Implement stability and log migration
phase.goal: Move diagnostics out of the synchronous hot path and reduce repeated projection cost.

task.name: Add append-only JSONL sink for diagnostics
task.description: Replace synchronous text-file writes for non-state logs with buffered JSONL append-only persistence.

task.name: Reduce runtime and sync hot-path logging
task.description: Trim high-frequency log calls in runtime-client, sync-context, and dialog/input paths so event storms do not flood disk or stdout.

task.name: Bound projection and cache growth
task.description: Reduce repeated full rebuilds of runtime message projections and cap or prune caches that grow over long sessions.

task.name: Harden fallback subscribe and cleanup paths
task.description: Add abort-aware control and retry backoff to the fallback subscribe loop and keep disposal paths deterministic.

phase.name: Validate and document the new behavior
phase.goal: Prove the fix under test and capture the final user-visible behavior.

task.name: Run focused regression coverage
task.description: Verify the new JSONL sink, the pressure tests, and the long-session stability checks.

task.name: Update docs and final verification notes
task.description: Record the new log storage model and summarize the stability changes for later implementation and review.

task.name: Preserve print-logs console mirror CLI compatibility
task.description: Declare the hidden print-logs option under strict TUI CLI parsing and verify it still enables the JSONL console mirror path.
